programme.title: E2 - Shark Go Boom
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth. We construct a giant shark on a motorized platform to test if you can hit, and explode, the tank with an M1 Garand rifle while perched in a precarious position.

programme.title: E10 - Wardens Case Files
programme.desc: An unbelievable account of carnage in the wild. Then a man's best friend gives a Warden a hand.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E3 - The Good, The Bad and Terry
programme.desc: In this classic western, Clint Eastwood – aka “Blondie” – saves Eli Wallach from the hangman’s noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from. We recreate each scene and test the reality of these shots with the weapons that were used.

programme.title: E4 - Dying Hard
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building. The only way to save himself is to shoot through the glass window and break through to safety. Using the same Beretta 92 handgun, we reconstruct the office glass and see if our host can break through.

programme.title: E3 - Always Bet on Dot
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: E2 - Torch vs. Chainsaw
programme.desc: This episode of Showdown of the Unbeatables features Acoustiblok noise reduction material versus The Nathan Air Chime; PVAC personal vacuum assisted climber versus world champion rock climber Tori Allen, and the Broco Torch versus ICS Hydraulic Chainsaw.

programme.title: E1 - Trial by Fire
programme.desc: The Darnell’s 9-month show tour begins in Cayuga as Driver, Chris prepares rookie, Wayner for his first show as Shockwave's solo-Crew Chief, a role that could literally be the difference between life or death for Chris.

They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E2 - Shark Go Boom
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth. We construct a giant shark on a motorized platform to test if you can hit, and explode, the tank with an M1 Garand rifle while perched in a precarious position.

programme.title: E3 - The Good, The Bad and Terry
programme.desc: In this classic western, Clint Eastwood – aka “Blondie” – saves Eli Wallach from the hangman’s noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from. We recreate each scene and test the reality of these shots with the weapons that were used.

programme.title: E4 - Dying Hard
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building. The only way to save himself is to shoot through the glass window and break through to safety. Using the same Beretta 92 handgun, we reconstruct the office glass and see if our host can break through.

programme.title: E3 - Always Bet on Dot
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E120 - Little Patscals / The Pre-Historic Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick learns what GrandPat's childhood was like. // Cave Pat hosts a show with his cave family.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E104 - The Boba-Get / Be Your Own Bean
programme.desc: Lil's favorite boba shop is closing! The kids try to save the café using pucker limes, but are quickly forced to save Canyon Valley from the pucker. // Lil and Min both realize how similar they are to their moms and set out to distinguish themselves.

programme.title: E619 - Forks and Knives Out
programme.desc: Lynn Sr. is stoked to compete on a televised cooking show until he learns he's up against Rosa Casagrande.

programme.title: E112 - Prank U Next
programme.desc: Max seeks help dealing with a mystery prankster at school from his old principal, who was always the target of his pranks. But Max fails to stop the pranks and quits the mission, prompting Chloe to confess that she was the prankster all along.

programme.title: E105 - Mime Games
programme.desc: When Danger Force and Captain Man are called to Paris to protect France's national treasures, Bose is accidentally left alone to try and stop The Toddler from breaking into The Man's Nest.

programme.title: E206 - Tori Tortures Teacher
programme.desc: The kids take Sikowitz to the theater to celebrate his ten-year teaching anniversary, but the play's subject matter sends Sikowitz into a deep depression. Tori must cheer him up.

programme.title: E209 - The Itching Scratch
programme.desc: Leo suits up as the Night Ninja one last time to take on the villainous cat named Scratch and his mutant Vampire Fleas. It's a grudge-match fifteen years in the making! But what does it all have to do with Splinter? The final battle begins!

programme.title: E115 - The Uncredible Journey / Host-a-Palooza
programme.desc: Tinkle, Ouchie, and Pinkeye must venture back home together after being taken away by mistake. // Patrick gets injured, so his family members take turns hosting the show.

programme.title: E116 - Backpay Payback / House Hunting
programme.desc: Granny Tentacles helps Squidward collect his paper delivery money from Cecil. // The Star family house runs away from home.

programme.title: E219 - Man Ray Returns / Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation! // Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E227 - Drive Happy / Old Man Patrick
programme.desc: SpongeBob can't drive, but you don't need a license to operate a self-driving car! // Patrick thinks he's an old man, so it's up to SpongeBob to remind him how much fun being a kid can be!

programme.title: E291 - Swimming Fools
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a pool in his backyard and Squidward tries to resist taking a dip.

programme.title: E202 - Intern for the Worse / The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. // When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: E104 - Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: E61
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: E4 - From The Three Lakes Region To Geneva, Via Lavaux
programme.desc: The Jura Foot railway line is one of the most beautiful in Switzerland. Lake Biel, Lake Neuchatel and on further south, the train wends its way to the wine-producing region of Lavaux. The journey then continues along the shores of Lake Geneva before ending in Geneva itself.

programme.title: E11 - The Cezallier, A Land Of Silence
programme.desc: In Auvergne, between the Sancy mountains and those of Cantal, lie the high plateaus of Cezallier: a world of solitude, silent, with mystical accents.

programme.title: E68
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E19 - In Chinon (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the region's castles and a local treasure, saffron.

programme.title: E4 - From The Three Lakes Region To Geneva, Via Lavaux
programme.desc: The Jura Foot railway line is one of the most beautiful in Switzerland. Lake Biel, Lake Neuchatel and on further south, the train wends its way to the wine-producing region of Lavaux. The journey then continues along the shores of Lake Geneva before ending in Geneva itself.

programme.title: E12 - Lvmh At Salle Pleyel/White Chocolate/Scad Lacoste/Sequins
programme.desc: LVMH drops its bags in the Salle Pleyel, presenting all its skills and craftsmanship. All about white chocolate. An American school in the Luberon: SCAD Lacoste trains the artists of tomorrow, guided by fashion designer Julien Fournier. Sparkle and glitter is back in fashion: how to wear sequins.

programme.title: E14 - Behind The Scenes At The Liege Opera!
programme.desc: From the costume workshop to the sets and the accessory stockroom, a tour of the Liege Opera where ''Traviata'' is performed. Also featuring director Jean-Marie Poire, landscape designer Alexandre Vandiest, Patrick Syen's Bentleys, and soprano Louise Foor.

programme.title: E9 - Shopping When You Are Visually Impaired?
programme.desc: Visually impaired individuals often encounter difficulties shopping, even online. Websites and stores are far too often poorly adapted to their condition. Also covered: antibiotics and farm animals; orange juice; ravioli for dessert.

programme.title: E7 - Virton
programme.desc: We head off to Virton, the capital of the Gaume region, which shares the title of ''sunniest region in Belgium'' with the coast! On the programme: the Baillet-Latour museum; the Wind Horse farm; downhill quad biking; city trip to Besancon...

programme.desc: The Jura Foot railway line is one of the most beautiful in Switzerland. Lake Biel, Lake Neuchatel and on further south, the train wends its way to the wine-producing region of Lavaux. The journey then continues along the shores of Lake Geneva before ending in Geneva itself.

programme.title: E7 - En Vadrouille Does Its Cabaret
programme.desc: In Villerest, Bijou opens the doors of his cabaret to Loic Ballet. Meryl and Victoria present him the art of wig creation, and Pascal introduces him to rare fruits.

programme.title: E68
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E19 - In Chinon (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the region's castles and a local treasure, saffron.

programme.title: E1 - Olivier Paradis, Trekking Guide In Morocco
programme.desc: Olivier Paradis welcomes Canadian tourists for a hike through the Moroccan High Atlas. Unfavourable weather conditions force them to change route, testing their capacity for adaptation and their flexibility of both mind and body. During their journey they cross the path of a group of noble Amazigh.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: E14 - Behind The Scenes At The Liege Opera!

programme.title: E9 - Shopping When You Are Visually Impaired?
programme.desc: Visually impaired individuals often encounter difficulties shopping, even online. Websites and stores are far too often poorly adapted to their condition. Also covered: antibiotics and farm animals; orange juice; ravioli for dessert.

programme.title: E7 - Virton
programme.desc: We head off to Virton, the capital of the Gaume region, which shares the title of ''sunniest region in Belgium'' with the coast! On the programme: the Baillet-Latour museum; the Wind Horse farm; downhill quad biking; city trip to Besancon...

programme.title: Zhi Financial News
programme.desc: Zhi Financial News is a daily news program on Shenzhen TV. The 10-minute show covers global financial headlines and offers authoritative insights into the latest economic trends.

programme.title: Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area
programme.desc: “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” is a bilingual interview program on Shenzhen TV that focuses on in-depth exploration and research. With a global perspective on the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, it captures cutting-edge trends in economic and trade exchanges, technological innovation, cultural trends, and more between China and the world. Through on-site research and interviews, the program engages in conversations with leaders from government, business, technology, and cultural sectors. It showcases technological achievements, trends in economic and trade exchanges, and mutual learning in civilization exchanges. Since its inception over two years ago, “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” has aired more than a hundred episodes of specialized interviews. The program integrates prominent international figures into the Greater Bay Area, where guests draw from their personal experiences living and working in the area or provide professional perspectives o

programme.title: Maozhou River
programme.desc: “Maozhou River”is a documentary series about China's first full scale river treatment operation. Throughout the four episodes, through the story of major characters, it documents the transformation of this “black river” to a clear waterway; the creativity and determination of Bao'an, Shenzhen, them exploring the ways of this city and industry-wide reformation; the nostalgia of the local residents, and their determination to watch over their hometown. This not only marks the history of this river, but also represent the history of this city, and a reflection on philosophy and our ecosystem.

programme.title: The Tailoff Games
programme.desc: Boss, Blister and Scab are always ready to play pranks on the Buffycats, but Lampo has had enough, so he decides to challenge them to a Tailoff match to solve the situation. This is going to be an exciting match!

programme.title: Oto Flips
programme.desc: Determined to win a shiny trophy of his own, Oto decides to attempt a world record for the biggest pancake. But can he really make it all by himself? The team sets off to a pancake festival at a Sugarbush in Quebec, Canada, to find out!

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Field of Giants
programme.desc: Fontaine and Smiling Finn get stuck inside a closing giant clam as the pirates battle the Nektons for the pearl within!

programme.title: Macro-germs
programme.desc: Eric discovers that washing your hands can prevent the spread of bacteria. He does an experiment to show how easy it is to spread these tiny germs from person to person.

programme.title: Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: When Anabella breaks a mirror, she worries that she's going to have bad luck, and refuses to go through with her Irish dancing recital! But are superstitions real? They travel to Blarney, Ireland to try to find a four-leaf clover to turn her luck around.

programme.title: Macro-germs
programme.desc: Eric discovers that washing your hands can prevent the spread of bacteria. He does an experiment to show how easy it is to spread these tiny germs from person to person.

programme.title: Chasing Dreams
programme.desc: All over England, the artistic boys are preparing for the National Championships. Ekraj has been selected for the South West team, and he has to perform at his very best to help win the team a medal.

programme.title: Vanishing Into the Sunset
programme.desc: Have you noticed that some things look further away than others on a flat surface, almost as if they were about to disappear? In this episode we introduce you to the concept of 'perspective', often used by painters to provide depth to objects.

programme.title: Facing Fears
programme.desc: One of the Junior Vets must confront his fear of goats, there's an emergency during surgery on a pet rabbit, and thirty-two thousand patients are waiting at a farm.

programme.title: Natural Wonders
programme.desc: Philippe heads to Hawaii to see a waterfall of lava pouring into the ocean. He goes to Antelope Canyon in Arizona, walks on a unique frozen lake in Alberta, and goes scuba diving into a cenote in Mexico.

programme.title: Macro-germs
programme.desc: Eric discovers that washing your hands can prevent the spread of bacteria. He does an experiment to show how easy it is to spread these tiny germs from person to person.

programme.title: Kogelberg - Source To Sea
programme.desc: The youngsters set off through difficult terrain before taking on fearsome rapids. Their journey takes them through a plant kingdom filled with thousands of unique plants and animals, including an unusual sea bird that cannot fly. Can you guess what animal it might be?

programme.title: Doki by the Dozen
programme.desc: How can we make a lot of cupcakes fast, and without getting in each other's way? To find out, Doki's team visits a toy factory in Germany where they see how an assembly line can help to make a lot of identical items in a short period.

programme.title: Accidentally Trapped
programme.desc: DiktaThor and Cleopatra ceasefire and combine forces to stop Sprinter. They put traps all over Hilltown, but everybody except Sprinter gets trapped. There is only one thing that the superhero can do - to set up the villains against each other.

programme.title: Communicating without Wires
programme.desc: How come we can't hear people talking next to us when we're in the sea? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of sound. Have hands-on fun by making a basic phone, and get to know Guglielmo Marconi, a physicist and inventor – ‘the father of radio'.

programme.title: Mapping and Levels
programme.desc: How come we see the Earth as flat when we know it's round? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of geography. Have hands-on fun by making a carpenter's level, and get to know Kim Jeong-ho, a cartographer who created the first detailed map of Korea.

programme.title: Chocolate Truffles
programme.desc: The little cooks discover where cocoa powder comes from, and add all the necessary ingredients to make some delicious chocolate truffles.

programme.title: Nailed It!
programme.desc: There is a giant nail in the lab as the doctors show what our nails are made of and what happens if you stub your toe, don't eat enough veg, or get a fungal infection. And Raphi and Rebecca are back to show us more about their lives.

programme.title: Mission: Mix Impossible!
programme.desc: Eric learns that a mixture of oil and vinegar will always end up separating because they have different densities. Shaking them will blend them again for a while. He does an experiment mixing different densities and gets some surprising results.

programme.title: Nailed It!
programme.desc: There is a giant nail in the lab as the doctors show what our nails are made of and what happens if you stub your toe, don't eat enough veg, or get a fungal infection. And Raphi and Rebecca are back to show us more about their lives.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Oto Flips
programme.desc: Determined to win a shiny trophy of his own, Oto decides to attempt a world record for the biggest pancake. But can he really make it all by himself? The team sets off to a pancake festival at a Sugarbush in Quebec, Canada, to find out!

programme.title: E64
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

Book of Love
programme.desc: Jiao Ye moved to Macau with her father when she was 15. She is a sassy casino worker who longs for love, but her life was hard. Daniel, a commitment-averse real estate agent in Los Angeles who specializes in selling properties to wealthy Chinese and father of a teenage son. Love blooms between the two as they start exchanging letters because of a book, they sharing their most personal and intimate self with each other.

programme.title: The Point Men
programme.desc: A group of Korean tourists is taken hostage by an extremist Taliban group in Afghanistan. The Korean government dispatches Jae-ho, known as one of Korea's most skilled diplomats, in order to handle the situation. Once he arrives, he asks for the Afghan government's cooperation and uses every means possible to free the hostages. However, his efforts go in vain. Due to his failure, he's forced to work with Dae-sik, a special agent who is an expert on the Middle East. As they begin making their move to get to the Taliban, the first hostage death occurs. With nowhere else to turn, the two become unlikely allies in a race against time to save the rest of the hostages.

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 《長安十二時辰》改編自馬伯庸的同名小説，講述了唐朝上元節前夕，長安城陷入危局，長安死囚張小敬臨危受命，與李必攜手在十二時辰內拯救長安的故事。

programme.title: E43
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 《長安十二時辰》改編自馬伯庸的同名小説，講述了唐朝上元節前夕，長安城陷入危局，長安死囚張小敬臨危受命，與李必攜手在十二時辰內拯救長安的故事。

programme.title: E43
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.desc: Lazlo organizes a dance with the Squirrel Scouts so that Lumpus can spend time with Jane Doe, but when the big night arrives, Lumpus is so nervous that his body literally explodes from fear.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E13 -The Nothing Club
programme.desc: When Edward excludes Lazlo from his secret club, Lazlo creates his own club out of nothing!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2E13 -More Flower To You
programme.desc: When Rodney kills Mr. J's prized flowers the night before a big flower show, he and Andy make outlandish promises to the plants so they'll stay healthy. Things get stranger when the plants begin making outlandish demands!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2E15 -Get A Lifeboat
programme.desc: Rodney and Mr. J get stuck in a lifeboat together. 'Nuff said.

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S2E9 -I Wish I Could Stop Hurting
programme.desc: Ruby sets off to settle a longstanding family feud.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: The most loveable criminal mastermind and his army of incomprehensible, yet adorable, yellow minions are back for a fourth instalment filled with outrageous adventures and family shenanigans.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2E15 -Finale: Meal Of A Lifetime
programme.desc: Season 2 Finale. The pressure is on as only one thing is now standing between our chefs and the title of Top Chef Junior: each other. The final 2 chefs must give it their all as they dream up the meal of a lifetime. Top Chef Junior Season 1 finalists Rahanna & Owen, and cooking legend Emeril Lagassé, all make special appearances in this thrilling conclusion as the final 2 chefs create mind-blowing menus demonstrating their growth from young cook to accomplished chef. To help them conquer this daunting task, a few familiar faces return…but will these returning chefs lend a hand or could there be too many cooks in this kitchen? In the end, only one of the finalists will receive the title of Top Chef Junior!

programme.title: Kapamilya Daily Mass[Live]
programme.desc: A daily celebration of the Liturgy of the Lord with Fr. Tito Caluag. Join us as we reflect on the goodness of God in this healing mass.

programme.title: It's Showtime Live[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Brgy[Live]
programme.desc: 'BRGY' is a daily talk-magazine-lifestyle show that celebrates stories about Filipinos by Filipinos. The show aims to bring home every Filipino wherever they are in the world. Sharing and conversations won't be limited to one space but it can be wherever your heart feel at ease.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E2 - Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Jill for some super creative adventures! It's time for the Princess Ball, & Jill decides to decorate her dress. Baby John accidentally spills paint on it, but Jill discovers that an accident can actually help creativity! Then, she decorates her shoes with sparkly stickers to make them the shiniest ever! The creative fun continues as Jill's dressed up as a pink firefighter to help her brothers & has to work hard to keep her princess bunny happy!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos with Orphle & Winston's worst ideas ever! First, Doubler accidentally multiplies monster truck Orphle, & all the new Orphles team up to cause trouble in Pet Port! Then, Winston wants to be turned into a big cat, but a Magic Pet accidentally turns him into a big rat instead, forcing Mila & Morphle to find him. The bad ideas continue as the two villains try to cheat to win a game of Capture the Flag!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Family Are His Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John thinks his family members are the best heroes! He really loves & admires his dad, & wants to copy everything he does to be just like him. His big brother Jack is a hero, too, & is always willing to help his little brother & teach him new things. After Mom's cupcakes go missing, Baby John dresses up as a police officer to find out who took them, interviewing each of his family member heroes!

programme.title: E2 - When Magical Pet Powers Run Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos as Magical Pet powers run wild! First, Bubblebear creates so many bubbles that they join together & become a giant Bubble Monster that traps everyone! Then, when Shrubcub gets sick, Pet Port is invaded by wayward vines, & the friends have to race against time to get her some magic tea. The wild powers continue as Slushyseal turns buildings & cars into giant juice pops that start to melt all over town!

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.desc: Get ready for chaos as Magical Pet powers run wild! First, Bubblebear creates so many bubbles that they join together & become a giant Bubble Monster that traps everyone! Then, when Shrubcub gets sick, Pet Port is invaded by wayward vines, & the friends have to race against time to get her some magic tea. The wild powers continue as Slushyseal turns buildings & cars into giant juice pops that start to melt all over town!

programme.title: E7 - Murderous Cop Or Innocent Gunman?
programme.desc: An off-duty police officer shoots a man in the chest after a social event explodes into a deadly argument between the two men.

programme.title: E2 - Crushing Suspicion
programme.desc: When a young woman dies in a car crash, it's up to the Coroner's Office to trigger an investigation into an accident that may have involved foul play.

programme.desc: A former NFL player and his wife are shot dead in Houston while they sleep. Their home is locked and alarmed, so, with no signs of an intruder, suspicion falls on their 16-year-old son.

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: Animal Invaders - The Battle Against Unwanted Species
programme.desc: Invasive species threaten flora and fauna and can destroy ecological balance. However, combating these dangerous invaders is costly and requires unusual measures.

programme.title: Searching For Clues - Donations For Islamist Terrorism?
programme.desc: Islamist terrorism continues to claim numerous victims worldwide. Extremist networks are financed in part by donations from Germany. But investigations often prove to be difficult.

programme.title: Nietzsche Explained: Why A 19Th Century Rebel Feels So Gen Z
programme.desc: Nietzsche Explained: from 'God is dead” to the Ubermensch, hype culture and Kanye West. More than 125 years after his death, Friedrich Nietzsche has become a surprising icon for Gen Z and Gen Alpha. His sharp critiques of morality, religion, and society feel uncannily modern in an age of social media, burnout, and constant self-optimization.

programme.title: Twist
programme.desc: Wisdom thief Ren Jiahua girlfriend Ann as an internal, using high-tech techniques robbed by the escort vehicle, have stolen money of one hundred and seventy thousand million. Crime Unit Chief Inspector Li Tiejian with detectives working around the clock to detect, eventually discover clues. Suspect that China and Ann is the mastermind of the case, but there is no evidence against. Lee tried various methods interrogations to no avail, Finally solely strict confession, but two willpower Jianli, tolerate the torture and recrimination Li officers tortured. Until the final drama, all the officers with ingenious ways, the two incriminating expose to justice.

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Manfred Wong (Part1)
programme.desc: Film producer Manfred Wong debuted as a scriptwriter who had been working for various film production companies in Hong Kong. Born in 1950s, he went through the heyday of film industry; witnessed the prosperity of homegrown productions in 1980s to 90s; heard rumor about a superstar being kidnapped to abrupt shooting; but also lamented for decade of steady decline of the city's film industry. Acted as a time witness, he is going to tell us the ups and downs of Hong Kong cinema.

programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E2 - Better Together
programme.desc: The wilds of Zambia are a tough place to live. Here, many animals must come together in groups to help defend territory, protect offspring, find food and overcome predators.

programme.title: E4 - The Road to Independence
programme.desc: As the babies grow, new power struggles break out in each troop. Watch as every member, from fierce Queen Crystal to low-ranking Erica, jockeys for position. Meanwhile, the babies start to understand how allies and enemies will shape their future.

programme.desc: Spy on the summer cubs as they learn to climb trees and forage for food in preparation for their release into the wild. Get surprised by a set of new arrivals, observe the annual pre-hibernation eating binge, and enjoy a bear-friendly Thanksgiving.

programme.title: E2 - The Body
programme.desc: Osteoporosis is a disease in which bones become brittle and easily broken. It is more common in women, and usually worsens with age. Michael Mosley sees how to keep bodies, bones and muscles healthy.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. programme.title: E44
programme.desc: A collection of outrageous problems that you have never heard of! A great 'knowledge talk show' where problematic children who are struggling and fighting in the emotional rooftop room gain true wisdom about life and the world.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: E3 - 風衣男神秒獲爆燈
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E7 - 德雲社「再戰」火星
programme.desc: 腦洞鑑定類綜藝推理脫口秀，陣容為薛之謙、大張偉、楊迪、劉維、黃子弘凡、黃聖依、龐博等…節目圍繞著當下熱梗熱點、觀眾的興趣點、共鳴點展開故事；火星特工廣發英雄帖正面對撞，迎戰近年最出圈、最有趣、最敢說的廠牌大咖們，真金不怕火煉，一場席卷全網的廠牌巔峰之戰即將展開！

programme.title: Love Life
programme.desc: Taeko and her husband, Jiro, are living a peaceful existence with son, Keita. A tragic accident brings the boy's father, Park, back into her life. Taeko throws herself into helping this deaf and homeless man to cope with pain and guilt
